message:
feat: add platform-specific ThreadInfo factory methods and wire thread
context through Discord, Slack, and Telegram connectors

Introduce normalized ThreadInfo constructors in fcp-core that
encapsulate the platform-specific logic for identifying threaded
conversations, then integrate them into the three messaging connectors
so that every event envelope now carries thread context when the
upstream platform provides it.

fcp-core/src/event.rs — new ThreadInfo factory methods:
- from_telegram_message_thread(message_thread_id, chat_id): creates a
  ForumTopic-kind ThreadInfo with the chat as parent, normalizing
  Telegram's i64 thread ID to a string
- from_slack_thread(thread_ts, parent_message_ts): creates a Reply-kind
  ThreadInfo, defaulting the parent to thread_ts itself when no
  distinct parent message is available (Slack's common case)
- from_discord_thread(channel_id, parent_channel_id): creates a
  Channel-kind ThreadInfo for thread channels
- from_discord_channel(channel_id, channel_type, parent_channel_id):
  filters by Discord channel type (10–12 = thread variants) and
  delegates to from_discord_thread, returning None for non-thread
  channels
- 6 unit tests covering all constructors, edge cases (None parents,
  non-thread channel types), and serde roundtrip

connectors/discord/src/connector.rs:
- gateway_event_to_fcp() now returns a 4-tuple including optional
  ThreadInfo; ChannelCreate and ChannelUpdate events extract thread
  info via new discord_thread_info() helper; all other event variants
  pass None
- New discord_thread_info(payload) helper: extracts channel id, type,
  and parent_id from JSON payload, delegates to
  ThreadInfo::from_discord_channel
- New test: channel_create with type=11 (public thread) verifies
  ThreadInfo is set with correct parent

connectors/slack/src/connector.rs:
- socket_frame_to_event() now attaches ThreadInfo when present
- New socket_payload_thread_info(payload) helper: looks for thread_ts
  in event, event.message, or event.previous_message (covers message
  replies, message_changed, and message_deleted events)
- New test: verifies ThreadInfo is set from thread_ts field

connectors/telegram/src/connector.rs:
- update_to_event() now returns a 3-tuple including optional
  ThreadInfo; Message and ChannelPost variants (new + edited) extract
  thread info via new message_thread_info() helper; CallbackQuery
  passes None
- New message_thread_info(msg) helper: extracts message_thread_id and
  chat.id, delegates to ThreadInfo::from_telegram_message_thread
- New test: forum topic message with message_thread_id=77 verifies
  ThreadInfo is set with correct parent chat

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
